pageContext.name: Front Man
pageContext.description: A perfect combination with the S.H.Figuarts Masked Soldier and Masked Worker/Manager figures (each sold separately). The mysterious leader of the guards, who seem to work for him... Standing 5.7 inches tall and featuring multiple points of articulation for easy posing and featuring a number of optional and removable accessories, this figure is sure to cast an imposing presence in your collection. Includes telephone and satellite phone.
